children.heading: Donor
children.label: 1 Donor
children.text: The term “donor” means any entity that is proposing to make a donation under this chapter.

children.label: B
children.text: partnership, corporation, trust, estate, cooperative, association, or any other organized group of persons;

children.label: C
children.text: Federal, State or local government (including any subdivision, agency or instrumentality thereof); or

children.label: D
children.text: any other private or governmental entity.
